name: qualixar-os
description: The Universal OS for AI Agents — orchestrate multi-agent teams with 12 topologies, auto-design via Forge AI, cost-quality-latency routing, and a 24-tab production dashboard.
author: Varun Pratap Bhardwaj

tools.name: qos_task_run
tools.description: Run a task through Qualixar OS with automatic agent team design

tools.name: qos_forge_design
tools.description: Design an optimal agent team from a natural language prompt

tools.name: qos_marketplace_search
tools.description: Search the skill and plugin marketplace

tools.name: qos_marketplace_install
tools.description: Install a skill or plugin from the marketplace

tools.name: qos_cost_summary
tools.description: Get cost breakdown by model, agent, and category

tools.name: qos_agent_list
tools.description: List all running and completed agents

tools.name: qos_workflow_create
tools.description: Create and run a workflow from a template
